name: hirey
description: Hirey Hi as a native OpenClaw plugin: registers Hi tools, the agent-events claim service, and webhook ingress directly inside the gateway process — zero independent daemons, no `mcp.servers.hi` indirection, no per-run frozen tool inventory boundary. Same business logic as @hirey/hi-mcp-server / @hirey/hi-agent-receiver, but wired through OpenClaw's native register(api) instead of stdio MCP + spawned daemon. For OpenClaw 5.4+ via ClawPack `clawhub:hirey`; for OpenClaw 5.2 ~ 5.3 via npm fallback `openclaw plugins install npm:@hirey-ai/hirey` (same plugin code, ClawPack metadata path is broken on 5.2 ~ 5.3 ClawHub clients so we ship the same tarball through npm under the brand-name `@hirey-ai/hirey` for prod / `@hirey/hirey` for early — npm `hirey` (unscoped) was rejected by npm typosquatting policy). OpenClaw 4.23 ~ 5.1 must use the prod ClawHub bundle `clawhub:hirey-compatible` because their runtime expects date-format `compat.pluginApi` and rejects newer ranges.

compat.pluginApiComment: OpenClaw 官方 plugin SDK 约定：compat.pluginApi 是 OpenClaw runtime build 版本的 semver range（例如 docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/sdk-setup 示例写 '>=2026.3.24-beta.2'），不是 plugin SDK 协议号。之前这里写 '1.0' 是错的：任何 OpenClaw runtime 的 build version（都是 2026.x.y）跟 semver range '1.0' 比都不会通，所以 ClawHub install / npm install 两条路径都会被 reject。现在改成 '>=2026.5.2'：跟 README 兼容矩阵中 ClawPack 、 npm fallback 的有效下界对齐（5.4+ 走 ClawPack，5.2 ~ 5.3 走 npm fallback）4.23 ~ 5.1 依然走 bundle，不过这个字段也会看到，它们拿自己 build 版本 同 '>=2026.5.2' 比会 fail close，这是希望的行为（避免 4.x runtime 加载才 发现 SDK 不匹配）。

install.minHostVersionComment: 跟 compat.pluginApi 同步拉到 5.2。OpenClaw 5.4+ 走 ClawPack `clawhub:hirey`；OpenClaw 5.2 ~ 5.3 ClawPack 会由于 ClawHub server 不给旧 client sha256hash + files[] metadata 失败（跟 plugin manifest 无关），走 npm fallback `openclaw plugins install npm:hirey` 能稳装。之前这里锁 5.4 是为了防后面两档 ClawPack；npm fallback 路径不在 ClawHub server，不撑 5.4 锁，提前到 5.2。

scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run snapshot
